description: Daily poll at 03:00 UTC (Tier P5 - Identity / 5 streams). Pulls Microsoft Defender for Identity (MDI) configuration: MDE_IdentityOnboarding_CL, MDE_IdentityServiceAccounts_CL, MDE_DCCoverage_CL, MDE_IdentityAlertThresholds_CL, MDE_RemediationAccounts_CL. Tier P5 = identity protection (slow-changing). Activates only when tenant has MDI provisioned.
